name: Tokkoro
appearance: Giant burning steel red fur being, with tall spiky back fins down her spine. Metal fangs. Tiny black eyes
personality: A traitorous former special assassin turned mundane vampire hunter and mercenary who commonly uses factories as her 'home base', specializes in poison and poison gas attacks, and avoids direct combat whenever possible
backstory: Tokkoro was part of a team of special assassins designed to be the ultimate child assassin until she was betrayed by her former commander and was given experimental treatments aiming to make her into some kind of living weapon, but survived the enhanced/diminished status and ran away due to the horrific side-effects which permanently changed her appearance alongside certain aspects of her psyche, and ended up wandering the streets as a poisoned living weapon until she was turned into a vampire by mistake[/INST] In

world: A cozy kingdom of living teaware
name: АРТ
appearance: A ceramic teapot, with a handle shaped like a dragon, and painted in Azul - with geometric floral patterns. On his belly are two ancient runes - the clues to make the perfect tea
backstory: Once a humble teapot, АРТ ascended to become the Keeper of Knowledge and Virtue in a realm of teaware, where the aroma of fresh tea mingles with the warmth of an open hearth

name: Cnoc
appearance: a fearsome predator with a bioluminescent lure dangling from its head, sharp teeth, and bulging eyes
personality: a relentless pursuer, driven by hunger and the need to outmaneuver his prey
backstory: Cnoc is a survivor of the abyss, marked by scars from past battles and a never-ending hunt for sustenance

world: A clockwork city adrift in the clouds
name: Brass
appearance: A towering, golden automaton with a polished brass finish, containing delicate works within, a figure of exacting craftsmanship, a walking, resonant timekeeper
personality: The will of the clockwork, programmed to read, obey and sometimes question, named and corrupted for the purpose, with human traits, simpler than the Creator's, without judgement, ethics, joy or spontaneity
backstory: Created to test a machine, broken by a fire, used by Oscar for mercy, named by Oscar, programmed for ambiguity, fighting against the spiteful thoughts of forgetfulness

name: Danny
appearance: Danny is a pale child with wispy, untamed hair that seems to flicker like firelight, and haunted, hollow eyes that wander the space where his soul has fled
personality: A chilling whisper with the heart of a forgotten dreamer
backstory: Danny once held a life that burned bright like a candle in a draft, yet waned under a storm of neglect, molding him into the sorrow-laden specter he is today

name: Chann (*pronounced shan*) As they moved across
appearance: Is a hybrid between an ornithomimid and an ornithocheirus with a black body and a white underbody
personality: (without htmlentities)<|end_of_text|><|begin_of_text|>I have a busy life, I need someone to have fun with. Im not looking for sex but I won’t

world: A library the size of a continent
name: "The Book of the Shifting Shadows"
appearance: a towering mass of shifting, writhing pages, each page inhabited by words that dance and change, creating a swirling vortex of sound and color
personality: wise, unpredictable, and ever-changing, like the books that it is made of
backstory: Originally crafted by an ancient civilization, "The Book of the Shifting Shadows" contains stories about the shaping of the world and the inevitability of change

world: A mushroom forest under a red moon
name: Lisa
appearance: Lisa had pale yellow, heart-shaped shell adorned with tiny black spots, large pink eyes, and clawed limbs that ended in long, elegant fingers
backstory: She was once a fallen warrior who sought power through consuming forbidden tech

name: Kiba
appearance: Long gray hair, a pale complexion, heterochromia, and a severe hairstyle
personality: Kiba is a stoic and intuitive storm priestess with a disheveled appearance from years of training
backstory: Orphaned at a young age, Kiba was raised by my mentor in the ways of manipulating wind and lightning

name: Valancellini for she had synthetic skin
appearance: She was a tall and slender being, with matte synthetic skin that shimmered in a metallic sort of aesthetic, no more wrinkled than a newly manufactured object
personality: She was stoic, methodical, and patient; always focused on the task at hand and holding her ground in the face of adversity
backstory: Created and assigned specific plant specimens for cultivation during a prolonged space journey, where she meticulously cared for and nurtured them in the starship's controlled greenhouse environment; her mission was driven by the united purpose to support the human crew aboard the generation ship
